labRequirements.drugClass: ACE inhibitors and angiotensin receptor blockers

labs.clinicalContext: Monitor for albuminuria progression in diabetic kidney disease

labRequirements.specialPopulationNotes: Specific to patients with diabetic kidney disease
labRequirements.sourceSnippet: ACEi/ARB microalbuminuria trial cluster (Refs 16-33, 35, 37-40): ~20 individual RCTs of ACE inhibitors and angiotensin receptor blockers in diabetic kidney disease, subsumed by Cochrane review (Ref 15, Strippoli 2006). Aggregate evidence for albuminuria progression reduction.
